channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts

item.title: Claude Cowork goes enterprise-wide: admins finally get spend brakes, RBAC, and observability to govern autonomous workflows. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/anthropic-claude-cowork-enterprise-rollout-april-2026 #AI #enterprise #Anthropic

item.title: Open-source Deep Agents Deploy hits beta, dethroning memory lock-in in closed AI ecosystems. Your data, your memory, your choice. 🔓🤖 https://Blockchain.News/news/langchain-deep-agents-deploy-open-source-anthropic-alternative #AI #OpenSource #LangChain
